goal: 将 /my-adjustment-requests 和 /admin/adjustment-requests 接入全局 ProtectedShell / 全局侧边栏布局
layoutStrategy: server page + client content split (matching existing /admin/db and /admin/users pattern)

serverClientSplit.rationale: ProtectedShell is a server component (uses cookies(), redirect, getCurrentUser). Client pages cannot use server-only features; the split is the project's established pattern.

codeChanges.userPageServer: import ProtectedShell, import content component, render <ProtectedShell><Content/></ProtectedShell>
codeChanges.userPageContent: 原 page.tsx 的全部 client 逻辑平移到 *-content.tsx，仅修改函数名 + 顶部 'use client'

fix.navigationConfig: unchanged — K28 阶段已配置 我的调课申请 + 调课审批
fix.k31BBackButton: preserved in content files (left of H1) per K31-C instructions

k31CVerify.result: K31-C ADJUSTMENT REQUEST PAGES PROTECTEDSHELL INTEGRATION VERIFY PASS

verification.authFoundation: 60/2 pre-existing (USER perm count 4 vs 5 + ScheduleAdjustment ACTIVE count drift)

knownLimitations: K31-C is layout-only; the K31-B inline back-to-dashboard button is retained as an in-content shortcut. The global sidebar also exposes 排课展示 for the same destination.
No other orphan K28 pages were audited in K31-C; if any exist, they may need a similar integration in a future stage
manualTrialNotes: USER: open /my-adjustment-requests — verify global sidebar visible, 我的调课申请 highlighted, admin-only items hidden, list/cancel work, sidebar can collapse
ADMIN: open /admin/adjustment-requests — verify global sidebar visible, 调课审批 highlighted, status filter/refresh/approve/reject work, sidebar can collapse
